cause: cold spec-judge returned ALIGNED true conditional on two README content gaps plus one required open marker; the gate could not pass as drafted
note: The open marker asked whether the impl-judge hands the subject the scenario title. It does -- the case-judge's stated input includes the scenario name and it simulates the agent from that input -- so the drafted title, which named the per-part branch mapping the rubric grades, was a live answer key. Retitled to name the situation instead. Closed both README gaps: the Known-limits bullet claimed the ambiguous-Oracle probe was tracked separately when this CR IS that probe, and the margin section carried no measured margin for the new dimensions. A second confirmation judge passed the closes and caught the fix reproducing the same defect one bullet down -- a fresh 'tracked separately' with no reference -- now cited as #252.

Ablation ran five conditions with production separated from scoring; the first two mutants were duds (the deleted branch's vocabulary survived elsewhere in the doctrine, so the reads re-derived it) and were rebuilt scrubbed before they measured anything.
